subcodes.first_line: O thou who art mentioned in the remembrance of thy Lord's servant in the Tablet, renowned! This is a Book that speaketh with truth and maketh mention therein of [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ک ر ی ذکر رحمه ربک عبده فی اللوح مذکورا و هذا کتاب ینطق بالحق و یذکر فیه من
subcodes.subjects: @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat], @rejection, opposition and persecution, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual transformation
